'''Brusc''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] and commanding officer of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Manticore]]'' in the [[Maw fleet]].

==Biography==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Brusc was one of the Imperial officers assigned to protect the [[Maw Installation]], an [[Imperial research center]] established by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] in the midst of the [[Maw Cluster/Legends|Maw Cluster]]. As captain of the ''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer ''Manticore'', he served in the fleet of four ''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyers. Brusc and his ship were placed under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]].

In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], Brusc and the ''Manticore'' participated in the pursuit of the experimental [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] [[Sun Crusher]], stolen by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[Kyp Durron]] and [[Qwi Xux]] from the Maw Installation. However, Daala's [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] emerged in the middle of [[Moruth Doole]]'s [[Doole's defense fleet|mercenary fleet]] and were engaged by the hostile spacecraft. In the battle, the combined fire of the ''Manticore'' and [[Basilisk (Star Destroyer)|''Basilisk'']] annihilated a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]], causing the remaining mercenary ships to flee to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Brusc and the ''Manticore'' survived the [[Skirmish in the Maw]], but the Sun Crusher escaped and its passengers informed the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] of the existence of the Maw Installation. Brusc and the ''Manticore'' accompanied with Daala in her guerrilla campaign against the New Republic. The first combat operation in which Brusc participated was the brutal [[Attack on Dantooine|massacre]] of the refugees and total destruction of their colony in [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].

Brusc and the ''Manticore'' were charged with the destruction of the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] orbital shipyards during the [[attack on Mon Calamari]]. As the ''[[Gorgon]]'' and the ''Basilisk'' caused heavy damage to floating cities on the surface of the planet, the ''Manticore'' approached the shipyards. However, a responding squadron of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] were successful in distracting the ''Manticore'' while the [[MC90 Star Cruiser]] ''[[Startide]]'' was remotely piloted by Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] to collide with the Star Destroyer. The collision with the ''Startide'' caused a massive explosion, destroying the ''Manticore'' and killing its crew, including Brusc. Daala was enraged by the loss of the ''Manticore'', but she was forced to withdraw as the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] arrived to the battle.
